card.name: Trailing 3 month Average Transactions by hour
Average Transaction Value by Day of Week

stages.native:
SELECT
    CASE EXTRACT(dow FROM opened_at)
        WHEN 0 THEN 'Sunday'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'Monday'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'Tuesday'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Wednesday'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Thursday'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'Friday'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'Saturday'
    END AS day_of_week,
    ROUND(AVG(total_amount)::numeric, 2) AS avg_revenue,
    MIN(EXTRACT(dow FROM opened_at)) AS day_order
FROM mock.transactions
GROUP BY day_of_week, EXTRACT(dow FROM opened_at)
ORDER BY day_order;

SELECT
    date_trunc('day', mock.transactions.opened_at) AS date,
    l.name AS location,
    ROUND(SUM(mock.transactions.total_amount)::numeric, 2) AS revenue
FROM mock.transactions
JOIN mock.locations l ON l.id = mock.transactions.location_id
WHERE mock.transactions.status = 'closed'
    AND {{opened_at}}
    [[AND l.name = {{location}}]]
GROUP BY date, l.name
ORDER BY date;

card.name: Average Daily Revenue by Day of Week

stages.native:
SELECT
    CASE day_totals.dow
        WHEN 0 THEN 'Sunday'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'Monday'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'Tuesday'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'Wednesday'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Thursday'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'Friday'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'Saturday'
    END AS day_of_week,
    ROUND(AVG(day_totals.daily_revenue)::numeric, 2) AS avg_daily_revenue,
    MIN(day_totals.dow) AS day_order
FROM (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('day', opened_at) AS day,
        EXTRACT(dow FROM opened_at) AS dow,
        SUM(total_amount) AS daily_revenue
    FROM mock.transactions
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', opened_at), EXTRACT(dow FROM opened_at)
) AS day_totals
GROUP BY day_of_week, day_totals.dow
ORDER BY day_order;

card.name: Average Table Turn Time by Hour

stages.native:
SELECT
    TO_CHAR(opened_at, 'HH AM') AS "Time of Day",
    EXTRACT(hour FROM opened_at) AS hour_order,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / 60)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Turn Time (min)",
    COUNT(*) AS "Transaction Count"
FROM mock.transactions
WHERE status = 'closed'
    AND closed_at IS NOT NULL
    AND closed_at > opened_at
    [[AND EXTRACT(dow FROM opened_at) = CASE {{day_of_week}}
        WHEN 'Sunday' THEN 0
        WHEN 'Monday' THEN 1
        WHEN 'Tuesday' THEN 2
        WHEN 'Wednesday' THEN 3
        WHEN 'Thursday' THEN 4
        WHEN 'Friday' THEN 5
        WHEN 'Saturday' THEN 6
    END]]
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(opened_at, 'HH AM'), EXTRACT(hour FROM opened_at)
ORDER BY hour_order;

SELECT
    l.name AS "Location",
    COUNT(*) AS "Total Transactions",
    ROUND(SUM(t.total_amount)::numeric, 2) AS "Total Revenue",
    ROUND(AVG(t.total_amount)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Check",
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (t.closed_at - t.opened_at)) / 60)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Turn Time (min)",
    ROUND((SUM(t.total_amount) / COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('day', t.opened_at)))::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Daily Revenue",
    0 AS sort_order
FROM mock.transactions t
JOIN mock.locations l ON t.location_id = l.id
WHERE t.status = 'closed'
    AND t.closed_at IS NOT NULL
    AND t.closed_at > t.opened_at
GROUP BY l.name

UNION ALL

SELECT
    'TOTAL',
    COUNT(*),
    ROUND(SUM(t.total_amount)::numeric, 2),
    ROUND(AVG(t.total_amount)::numeric, 2),
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (t.closed_at - t.opened_at)) / 60)::numeric, 1),
    ROUND((SUM(t.total_amount) / COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('day', t.opened_at)))::numeric, 2),
    1 AS sort_order
FROM mock.transactions t
JOIN mock.locations l ON t.location_id = l.id
WHERE t.status = 'closed'
    AND t.closed_at IS NOT NULL
    AND t.closed_at > t.opened_at

ORDER BY sort_order, "Location";

SELECT
    TO_CHAR(opened_at, 'HH AM') AS "Time of Day",
    EXTRACT(hour FROM opened_at) AS hour_order,
    COUNT(*) AS "Transaction Count",
    ROUND(AVG(total_amount)::numeric, 2) AS "Average Check Size",
    ROUND(SUM(total_amount)::numeric, 2) AS "Total Revenue"
FROM mock.transactions
WHERE status = 'closed'
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(opened_at, 'HH AM'), EXTRACT(hour FROM opened_at)
ORDER BY hour_order;

SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('week', opened_at) AS "Week",
    ROUND(SUM(total_amount)::numeric, 2) AS "Total Revenue",
    COUNT(*) AS "Transaction Count"
FROM mock.transactions
WHERE status = 'closed'
AND opened_at >= '2026-02-02'
AND opened_at < '2026-04-20'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', opened_at)
ORDER BY "Week";

SELECT
    mi.name AS "Menu Item",
    ROUND(SUM(li.subtotal)::numeric, 2) AS "Total Revenue",
    SUM(li.quantity) AS "Order Count"
FROM mock.line_items li
JOIN mock.menu_items mi ON li.menu_item_id = mi.id
JOIN mock.transactions t ON li.transaction_id = t.id
WHERE t.status = 'closed'
GROUP BY mi.name
ORDER BY "Total Revenue" DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('week', opened_at) AS "Week",
    ROUND(AVG(total_amount)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Transaction Value",
    COUNT(*) AS "Transaction Count"
FROM mock.transactions
WHERE status = 'closed'
AND opened_at >= '2026-02-02'
AND opened_at < '2026-04-27'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', opened_at)
ORDER BY "Week";

SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS "Month",
    ROUND(SUM(total_amount)::numeric, 2) AS "Total Revenue",
    COUNT(*) AS "Transaction Count"
FROM mock.transactions
WHERE status = 'closed'
    [[AND DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) >= TO_DATE({{month}}, 'YYYY-MM') - INTERVAL '1 month'
    AND DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) <= TO_DATE({{month}}, 'YYYY-MM')]]
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
ORDER BY "Month";

SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS "Month",
    ROUND(SUM(total_amount)::numeric, 2) AS "Total Revenue",
    COUNT(*) AS "Transaction Count"
FROM mock.transactions
WHERE status = 'closed'
    [[AND DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) >= TO_DATE({{month}}, 'YYYY-MM') - INTERVAL '1 month'
    AND DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) <= TO_DATE({{month}}, 'YYYY-MM')]]
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
ORDER BY "Month";

SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS "Month",
    ROUND(AVG(total_amount)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Transaction Value",
    COUNT(*) AS "Transaction Count"
FROM mock.transactions
WHERE status = 'closed'
    [[AND DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) >= TO_DATE({{month}}, 'YYYY-MM') - INTERVAL '1 month'
    AND DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) <= TO_DATE({{month}}, 'YYYY-MM')]]
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
ORDER BY "Month";

card.name: Percentage of Revenue Driven by Busiest 3 Hours

stages.native:
WITH hourly_revenue AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('day', opened_at) AS day,
        EXTRACT(hour FROM opened_at) AS hour,
        SUM(total_amount) AS hour_revenue
    FROM mock.transactions
    WHERE status = 'closed'
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', opened_at), EXTRACT(hour FROM opened_at)
),
daily_totals AS (
    SELECT
        day,
        SUM(hour_revenue) AS daily_revenue
    FROM hourly_revenue
    GROUP BY day
),
daily_top3 AS (
    SELECT
        hr.day,
        SUM(hr.hour_revenue) AS top3_revenue
    FROM (
        SELECT
            day,
            hour_revenue,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY day ORDER BY hour_revenue DESC) AS rank
        FROM hourly_revenue
    ) hr
    WHERE hr.rank <= 3
    GROUP BY hr.day
)
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', dt.day) AS "Month",
    ROUND(AVG(d3.top3_revenue / dt.daily_revenue * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "Top 3 Hours Revenue %"
FROM daily_totals dt
JOIN daily_top3 d3 ON dt.day = d3.day
    [[AND DATE_TRUNC('month', dt.day) >= TO_DATE({{month}}, 'YYYY-MM') - INTERVAL '1 month'
    AND DATE_TRUNC('month', dt.day) <= TO_DATE({{month}}, 'YYYY-MM')]]
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', dt.day)
ORDER BY "Month";

visualization_settings.card.title: Percent of Revenue Driven by Busiest 3 Hours of day

stages.native:
SELECT
    payment_method AS "Payment Method",
    COUNT(*) AS "Transaction Count",
    ROUND(SUM(total_amount)::numeric, 2) AS "Total Revenue",
    ROUND(AVG(total_amount)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Transaction Value"
FROM mock.transactions
WHERE status = 'closed'
GROUP BY payment_method
ORDER BY "Total Revenue" DESC;

WITH item_pairs AS (
    SELECT
        a.transaction_id,
        mi_a.name AS "Item A",
        mi_b.name AS "Item B",
        a.subtotal + b.subtotal AS pair_revenue
    FROM mock.line_items a
    JOIN mock.line_items b ON a.transaction_id = b.transaction_id
        AND a.menu_item_id < b.menu_item_id
    JOIN mock.menu_items mi_a ON a.menu_item_id = mi_a.id
    JOIN mock.menu_items mi_b ON b.menu_item_id = mi_b.id
    JOIN mock.transactions t ON a.transaction_id = t.id
),
item_totals AS (
    SELECT
        mi.name AS item_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT li.transaction_id) AS total_transactions
    FROM mock.line_items li
    JOIN mock.menu_items mi ON li.menu_item_id = mi.id
    GROUP BY mi.name
)
SELECT
    ip."Item A",
    ip."Item B",
    COUNT(*) AS "Times Ordered Together",
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / LEAST(it_a.total_transactions, it_b.total_transactions)::numeric, 1) AS "Attach Rate %",
    ROUND(AVG(ip.pair_revenue)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Pair Order Value",
    ROUND(SUM(ip.pair_revenue)::numeric, 2) AS "Total Pair Revenue"
FROM item_pairs ip
JOIN item_totals it_a ON ip."Item A" = it_a.item_name
JOIN item_totals it_b ON ip."Item B" = it_b.item_name
GROUP BY ip."Item A", ip."Item B", it_a.total_transactions, it_b.total_transactions
ORDER BY "Attach Rate %" DESC;

card.name: Unit Price vs Order Totals Table

stages.native:
SELECT
    mi.name AS "Menu Item",
    mi.base_price AS "Unit Price",
    COUNT(li.id) AS "Order Frequency",
    ROUND(SUM(li.subtotal)::numeric, 2) AS "Total Revenue($)",
    ROUND(AVG(li.quantity)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Quantity Per Order"
FROM mock.menu_items mi
JOIN mock.line_items li ON mi.id = li.menu_item_id
JOIN mock.transactions t ON li.transaction_id = t.id
WHERE t.status = 'closed'
GROUP BY mi.name, mi.base_price
ORDER BY "Total Revenue($)" DESC;

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN total_amount < 40 THEN '1. Under $40'
        WHEN total_amount < 60 THEN '2. $40 - $60'
        WHEN total_amount < 80 THEN '3. $60 - $80'
        WHEN total_amount < 100 THEN '4. $80 - $100'
        WHEN total_amount < 120 THEN '5. $100 - $120'
        WHEN total_amount < 140 THEN '6. $120 - $140'
        WHEN total_amount < 160 THEN '7. $140 - $160'
        ELSE '8. Over $160'
    END AS "Check Size Range",
    COUNT(*) AS "Transaction Count",
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER ()::numeric, 1) AS "Percentage of Transactions",
    ROUND(AVG(total_amount)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Check in Range"
FROM mock.transactions
WHERE status = 'closed'
GROUP BY "Check Size Range"
ORDER BY "Check Size Range";
